languages.text: "Теологическая дискуссия подождет. Займусь вашим вопросом позднее".
"The theological discussion can wait. I will deal your issue later."
languages.original_text: "Теологическая дискуссия подождет. Займусь вашим вопросом позднее".

traits.locale_text: "The theological discussion can wait. I will address your matter later."
"The theological discussion can wait. I will address your matter later."
"The theological discussion can wait. I will deal your issue later."
"The theological discussion can wait. I will deal your issue later."

languages.text: «El debate teológico puede esperar. Me ocuparé de ello más adelante».
languages.original_text: "The theological discussion can wait. I will deal your issue later."

traits.locale_text: «El debate teológico puede esperar. Me ocuparé de ello más adelante».

languages.text: « Ce débat théologique peut attendre. Je m'en occuperai plus tard. »
languages.original_text: "The theological discussion can wait. I will deal your issue later."

traits.locale_text: « Ce débat théologique peut attendre. Je m'en occuperai plus tard. »

languages.text: “神学讨论先不急。我后面再处理你们的事。”
languages.original_text: "The theological discussion can wait. I will deal your issue later."

traits.locale_text: “神学讨论先不急。我后面再处理你们的事。”

languages.text: "Die theologische Diskussion kann warten. Ich werde mich später mit Eurem Problem befassen."
languages.original_text: "The theological discussion can wait. I will deal your issue later."

traits.locale_text: Die theologische Diskussion kann warten. Ich werde mich später mit Eurem Problem befassen.

languages.text: "Teolojik tartışmalar bekleyebilir. Bu konuyla daha sonra ilgileneceğim."
languages.original_text: "The theological discussion can wait. I will deal your issue later."

traits.locale_text: "Teolojik tartışmalar bekleyebilir. Bu konuyla daha sonra ilgileneceğim."

languages.text: 「神学的な議論は後回しでよい。お前たちの問題は、後で対処する」
languages.original_text: "The theological discussion can wait. I will deal your issue later."

traits.locale_text: 「神学的な議論は後回しでよい。お前たちの問題は、後で対処する」
